translations.Virus %s is detected in the file. Upload: Su virus %s s'est rilevadu in s'archìviu. Non faghet a cumpletare su carrigamentu.
translations.Scanner exit status or signature to sear: Istadu de s'essida de s'iscansionadore o firma de chircare
translations.Failed to save settings: No at fatu a sarvare is informatziones
translations.Extra command line options (comma-separa: Sèberos in prus de sa lìnia de cumandu (seberados dae vìrgula)
Indiritzu de su retzidore de antivirus
Nùmeru de porta de su retzidore de antivirus.
translations.When infected files are found during a b: Cando is archìvios impestados s'agatant in un'iscansione in segundu pianu
translations.Sorry, but a malware was detected in a f: Unu programma malintragnadu s'est rilevadu in un'archìviu chi as proadu a carrigare e s'est dèpidu cantzellare.
translations.This email is a notification from {host}: Custu messàgiu de posta est una notìfica dae {host}. Non torres risposta.
